mapper.select:
SELECT id, full_name, email, department, position, role, CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS status, NULL AS latest_login_at, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0
AND (LOWER(full_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
AND LOWER(department) = LOWER(#{department})
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0
AND (LOWER(full_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
AND LOWER(department) = LOWER(#{department})

SELECT id, full_name, email, department, position, role, CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS status, NULL AS latest_login_at, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND is_active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND is_active = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0 AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())
SELECT COALESCE(department, 'Unknown') AS department, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE delete_flg = 0 GROUP BY department
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (full_name, email, department, position, password_hash, role, is_active, delete_flg, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{department}, #{position}, #{passwordHash}, #{userType}::VARCHAR, TRUE, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET full_name = #{name}, department = #{department}, position = #{position}, role = #{userType}::VARCHAR, updated_at = NOW() , password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flg = 0
UPDATE users SET delete_flg = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
